$comment: AIMarket Hub capability manifest for a Metis deployment. Copy, set invoke_url to your PUBLIC https Metis host + /aimarket/invoke, then register with `aimarket publish aimarket-capability.json` (aimarket-hub CLI) or POST to {hub}/ai-market/v2/supply/register. Registration is OPTIONAL — Metis runs standalone without it. For localhost dev set AIMARKET_ALLOW_LOCAL_PUBLISH=1 on the hub.
name: Metis verified cognition
description: Run a query through the Metis cognitive stack (Understanding Council -> confidence gate -> layered MoA -> verifier) and get back a verification envelope: answer, verify_score, verified flag, route, depth, and clarifications when the input is too ambiguous to answer confidently.

input.description: A query string, or {messages|query|prompt|text}, or any JSON payload.

route.description: Optional route override; omit to auto-route by task type.
